task_completion.description: Weasis application is open and displaying a medical image.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Weasis GUI is visible on the screen with a medical image (DICOM) loaded in the main viewing area.

task_completion.description: The Lens (Magnifier/Loupe) tool is activated in Weasis.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Lens/Magnifier tool icon is highlighted or selected in the Weasis toolbar, or selected from a context menu.

task_completion.description: The magnifier widget is positioned over the medical image.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A distinct magnifying glass effect, loupe, or zoomed-in floating window is visible directly over a portion of the medical image in the Weasis viewer.

task_completion.description: A screenshot of the application showing the active magnifier is captured.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot utility (e.g., gnome-screenshot, Flameshot) is visible capturing the screen, or a save dialog for the screenshot is open.

task_completion.description: The screenshot is saved to the exact required path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal, file manager, or save dialog shows the file being saved specifically as 'lens_active.png' inside the '/home/ga/DICOM/exports/' directory.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Weasis application to use the magnifier.
integrity.visual_evidence: The magnifier effect must be a genuine Weasis UI element, not a box drawn using an external image editor like GIMP or Pinta.

integrity.description: The agent captured a real screenshot of the desktop/application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent used a GUI screenshot tool or standard screenshot shortcut, rather than using terminal commands to copy or download a pre-existing image.

integrity.description: The output file is a genuine image file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The file manager or terminal shows the file has a .png extension and a non-zero file size (at least 15KB), rather than being an empty file created via 'touch'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output screenshot must be saved exactly to '/home/ga/DICOM/exports/lens_active.png'. The file must be a valid, non-empty image with a minimum file size of 15,000 bytes.
